channel.title: UB Analytics · World Cup 2026 Predictions
channel.description: Matchday predictions with public track record.

item.title: Czech Republic vs South Africa: Czech Republic by 1 (54%)
item.description: Group A, 2026-06-18, Atlanta. Czech Republic 54% / draw 26% / South Africa 20%. Predicted margin 1.

item.title: Mexico vs South Korea: Mexico by 1 (59%)
item.description: Group A, 2026-06-18, Zapopan. Mexico 59% / draw 25% / South Korea 16%. Predicted margin 1.

item.title: Switzerland vs Bosnia and Herzegovina: Switzerland by 1 (68%)
item.description: Group B, 2026-06-18, Inglewood. Switzerland 68% / draw 22% / Bosnia and Herzegovina 10%. Predicted margin 1.

item.title: Canada vs Qatar: Canada by 2 (84%)
item.description: Group B, 2026-06-18, Vancouver. Canada 84% / draw 12% / Qatar 4%. Predicted margin 2.
